title: Integrations Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 3 — populated integrations family schema. Eight integrations from Contract §18.0 (Procore, Sage Intacct, Compass, Document Crunch, Adobe Sign, Cupix, Teams, Outlook); Procore-specific records from §10.6 / §11.7 / §15.13.1–§15.13.6 / §18.1.5 / §18.1.7 / §18.1.12 / §18.1.13 / §22.2 / Roadmap §8. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/integrations.fields.json. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24). Procore boundary is hard-encoded: noFullProcoreMirror / noDirectSpfxToProcore / noProcoreSecrets / procoreDirectoryComparison_ReadOnly / procoreWriteback_Deferred all const true; OC-17 and OC-18 placeholder fields are optional only and never become a full Procore canonical model in Phase 1. Sage Intacct is the accounting book of record (VR-14); Procore is operational / project-management state. PCC does not become a financial book of record. ProcoreCompanyId default is '5280' as configuration, never a secret.

integrationName.description: One of the eight integrations from Contract §18.0.

sourceSystem.description: Source-system label (e.g., 'Procore', 'Sage Intacct'). Sage Intacct is the accounting book of record per VR-14.

classification.description: Operational vs accounting-book-of-record. Sage Intacct = accounting; Procore = operational. PCC does not become a financial book of record.

lastHealthCheck.description: UTC timestamp of last health check.

noFullProcoreMirror.description: Hard guardrail. SharePoint is not a full Procore mirror. Allowed shapes: mapping, summary, exception, action queue, sync health, audit, object link. Forbidden shapes: raw payload, high-volume detail history, bulk attachment, full binary mirror. VR-16; Contract P-10.

noDirectSpfxToProcore.description: Hard guardrail. SPFx must not call Procore directly; all traffic routes through backend/functions/. VR-12 cross-layer (SPFx + Backend + Documentation).

noProcoreSecrets.description: Hard guardrail. No Procore client IDs, secrets, refresh tokens, DMSA credentials, OAuth secrets, or environment credentials in any schema, SharePoint surface, SPFx surface, markdown, repo source, or client config. VR-13.

procoreMapping_ProcoreCompanyId.description: Default '5280'. Configuration, not secret. Three-form contract per §10.6 / §18.1.5. VR-10.

procoreMapping_ProcoreSyncEnabled.description: Sync enabled flag; default false at provisioning. Runtime Configuration.

procoreMapping_ConfiguredBy.description: Mapping owner UPN. Primary: Project Manager; Fallback: Project Executive; Repair: IT/Integration Admin. Project Accountant is NOT the mapping owner. VR-11.

procoreSubjectAreaRegistry_Enabled.description: Enabled flag; default false at provisioning. Runtime Configuration.

procoreSubjectAreaRegistry_StorageTarget.description: Storage target. VR-16 / Contract P-10 storage strategy.

procoreSyncHealth_ErrorMessageRedacted.description: Plain-language redacted error message; never raw payload, token, or URL with secrets. §18.1.12; VR-13.

procoreSyncHealth_RepairActionAvailable.description: Whether repair action surfaces in Site Health (§19A). VR-22.

procoreObjectLink_SourceSystem.description: OC-17 placeholder / future-reference only. Constant 'Procore'. Phase 1 introduces no full Procore canonical object model and no Procore binary mirror; honors no-full-Procore-mirror rule (Contract P-10; VR-16). Lineage-only string.

procoreObjectLink_ProcoreObjectType.description: OC-17 placeholder / future-reference only. Lineage-only string identifying the Procore object kind (e.g., rfi, submittal, observation, punch_item, commitment, change_event).

procoreObjectLink_ProcoreObjectId.description: OC-17 placeholder / future-reference only. Lineage ID only; no payload mirror.

procoreObjectLink_ProcoreObjectUrl.description: OC-17 placeholder / future-reference only. Deep link to Procore object.

procoreCuratedSummary_SummaryType.description: OC-18 placeholder / future-reference only. Phase 1 materializes no summaries; honors no-full-Procore-mirror rule (Contract P-10; VR-16).

procoreCuratedSummary_Enabled.description: OC-18 placeholder / future-reference only. Default false.

procoreIntegrationAudit_BeforeState.description: Compact JSON of pre-mutation state; redacted of secrets. VR-13.

procoreIntegrationAudit_AfterState.description: Compact JSON of post-mutation state; redacted of secrets. VR-13.

procoreDirectoryComparison_ReadOnly.description: Procore directory comparison is read-only and does not auto-grant SharePoint access. VR-15; P-17.

procoreWriteback_Deferred.description: Procore write-back remains Deferred from MVP per VR-20 / Roadmap §8 must-not-include.

sageIntacct_ProjectId.description: Sage Intacct project ID. Sage Intacct is the accounting book of record (VR-14).

adobeSign_WorkspaceMapping.description: Adobe Sign workspace / account mapping (Required at Active Construction; Deferred until then).

cupix_ProjectId.description: Cupix project ID (Required for Luxury Residential; Optional otherwise).

teams_ChannelOrTeamId.description: Microsoft Teams channel/team ID (link-out only). VR-28.

outlook_CalendarMapping.description: Outlook Calendar mapping (link-out only). Concrete type TBD; contract describes the concept without specifying a structured type. Resolvable downstream without an architecture decision.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24.

integrationClassification.description: Source-system classification. Sage Intacct = accounting book of record (VR-14); Procore = operational / project-management state. PCC does not become a financial book of record.

procoreErrorCategory.description: Procore sync error category enum from §15.13.3.

procoreStorageTarget.description: Procore storage target enum from §15.13.2 / §18.1. Allowed shapes only; no full binary mirror (VR-16).

procoreApiLifecycleStatus.description: Procore API lifecycle status enum from §15.13.2.

procoreIntegrationAuditAction.description: Procore Integration Audit action enum from §15.13.6.
